error.patterns_not_found: ❌ Failed to find patterns for a regex entity
error.values_not_found: ❌ Failed to find values for a gazetteer entity
error.get_audio_device: An error has accured: The {key} was not found!
error.vosk_selection_cancel1: ❌ Vosk model selection canceled by user.
error.vosk_selection_cancel2: ❌ Assistant is Unable to run without a vosk model, unless you turn off Vosk via the Debug Menu!
error.vosk_failed: ❌ Failed to Setup Vosk Model! Error: {e}
error.vosk_wrong_directory: ❌ Vosk Model Directory was not valid! Please select the folder containing the Vosk Model.
error.api_detail: ❌ {website} error or perhaps you have not set up your API key correctly!
error.action_uncompleted: ❌ [ACTION] The assigned action file could not be properly executed!

report.vosk_model_set: 🟢 New Vosk Model Directory has been set!
report.no_connection: Sorry! There is no internet connection, command cannot be performed!
report.no_nickname: I couldn't hear or recognize any {nickname} name. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
report.ping_output: The system sent {sent} packets to the target and received {received} responses, resulting in {loss_percent}% packet loss. with an average latency of {avg_latency} ms.
report.crypto_price: The current price of {crypto} is {price} US dollars.
report.crypto_status: {crypto} has changed by {change} with a volume of {volume} USD in the last twenty four hours, and now is standing at {price} US dollars.
report.crypto_fail: I couldn't retrieve the information. Maybe the cryptocurrency name wasn't recognized.
report.crypto_end: Okay, ending crypto currency status check. Is there anything else I can help you with?
report.vosk_disabled: 🟡 Vosk disabled. Type your commands instead.
report.wake_timeout: 🟡 Wake word timeout, returning to sleep mode...
report.debug_closed: 🟢 Debug menu closed. Returning to Assistant.
report.file_not_located: I was not able to locate {name}!
report.system_status: CPU usage is {cpu}, and RAM usage is {ram_percent} percent. {connection}
report.volume_not_heard: I couldn't hear any volume value.
report.volume_not_found: 🔴 No volume number found in command.
report.volume_error: There was an error in setting the volume
report.api_not_found:
No API key found! 
Go to {website} to get your API key
report.error_connecting_api: There was an error connecting to the API.
report.info_not_found: I couldn't retrieve the information. Please check your API key.
report.weather_detail: The temperature is {temp} degrees {unit_display} with {humidity} percent humidity.
report.room_humidity: Currently, the room humidity stands at {response}%.
report.error_fetching_data: There was an error fetching the data.
report.unknown_command: The action file for this command is not found!
report.unable_to_understand: Sorry! I was unable to understand the command.
report.action_load_failed: Sorry! The action file for this command has failed to load!
report.action_run_failed: Sorry! The action for this command failed to perform! It is possible that its file is broken!
report.hlimit_fail: Maximum humidity cannot be lower than its minimum value!

prompts.offline: OFFLINE MODE !! THE MODE WILL SWITCH AUTOMATICALLY UPON INTERNET CONNECTIVITY
prompts.wake_active: Wake word detected, now listening for commands...
prompts.standby_mode: Going on stand-by! Type something whenever you wish to wake me up.

request.say_confirm: Sorry, I did not understand. Please say {confirm} or {decline}.
request.type_confirm: Sorry, I did not understand. Please type {confirm} or {decline}.
request.crypto_repeat: Would you like to know another crypto currency's price?
request.dir: Could you show me where {name} is located?
request.set_api: You have not set your API key yet! Fetch your API key from {website_name} then use debug menu to set your API.

arduino.not_found: [!] No Arduino found on any port
arduino.no_access: I was unable to access arduino, could it be turned off? or not set up correctly?
arduino.hint: You first need to turn on Arduino in the debug_menu before using its commands!
arduino.wrong_limit: This value is not within the limit and cannot be set!

defaults.welcome_message: Hello! I am at your service! call me if you need anything.
